section-partners: With partners like this,there’s nowhere to go but up.Car ServiceAirlinesInfrastructureR&DTechnologyGovernmentWe’re partnering with global leaders in ground transportation to seamlessly integrate air mobility into the future of door-to-door travel.Our partnerships with leading global airlines will integrate our air taxi service into existing aviation networks.Together with key infrastructure partners, we’re building the physical backbone needed for convenient everyday flight.We collaborate with pioneers in manufacturing and innovation to create a vertically integrated, world-class production ecosystem.Our aviation technology partnerships power the systems that support navigation, autonomy, pilot training, and operational excellence.We collaborate with forward-thinking government agencies to shape policy, accelerate innovation, and enable the introduction of advanced air mobility.
story: The sky was never the limit.Discover our StoryDiscover our StoryWork at JobyWork at JobyIn 2009, a small team of Joby engineers set out to build the future of flight. Thousands of test flights later, we've turned "what if" into "what's next"?
illustration: Our future visionNew wave aviationDream of Flight Dream ofFlightFuture Vision — 1Imagine a world where every cross-town invitation is a definite 'yes'.Future Vision — 2Where game day is gridlock-free and every restaurant is local.Future Vision — 3Where our cities are greener, more friendly places to be.
unnamed-section-0: Skip traffic.Time to fly. The future of aviation is coming soon.Elevate your commute with our all-electric air taxi, soon to be bookable at the tap of a button.Zero traffic. Zero operating emissions. Just the space and time your day deserves.
